faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

1.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

2.a: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

3.q: What payment methods do you accept?
3.a: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal.

faq.q1: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time without additional fees. You will keep access to premium features until the end of the paid period.
faq.q2: Do the prices include all mentioned features?
faq.a2: Yes, all features listed in each plan are included in the monthly price. There are no hidden costs or additional fees.
faq.q3: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.a3: Absolutely! You can change your plan at any time. Changes will be applied in the next billing cycle.
faq.q4: Do you offer a discount for annual payment?
faq.a4: Yes, we offer a 20% discount for annual subscription on all paid plans. Contact us for more details.

pricing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our plans

about.title: About Lumina
about.subtitle: Learn more about the project
about.description: Lumina is a Discord bot built for League of Legends players, with moderation, gacha, music and more. Built with love by the community.
about.devDesc: Passionate about technology and software development. I love creating innovative and efficient solutions.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last updated: July 2025
terms.accept: By using Lumina, you agree to these terms.
terms.section1Body: By using Lumina, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the bot.
terms.section2Body: Lumina is a Discord bot that provides various League of Legends-related features, including match history and statistics.
terms.section3Body: You agree to use Lumina only for lawful purposes. You are prohibited from using the bot to violate any laws, regulations, or third-party rights.
terms.section4Body: Lumina collects data from the Riot Games API and Discord interactions to provide its services. By using Lumina, you consent to this data collection.
terms.section5Body: All content provided by Lumina, including but not limited to text, graphics, and code, is the property of the developer and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.section6Body: Lumina is provided "as is" without any warranties. The developer is not responsible for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the bot.
terms.section7Body: The developer reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be published, and continued use of Lumina constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section8Body: These terms are governed by the laws of Brazil. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Brazil.
terms.privacySection1Item1: Discord user and message IDs for interaction purposes.
terms.privacySection1Item2: League of Legends data from the Riot Games API.
terms.privacySection2Body: The collected information is used to:
terms.privacySection3Body: Lumina does not share your personal data with third parties, except as required by law or to protect the rights and safety of the developer and users.
terms.privacySection4Body: The developer takes reasonable measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
terms.privacySection5Item1: Access the data Lumina has collected about you.
terms.privacySection5Item2: Request the deletion of your data.
terms.privacySection6Body: The developer reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be published, and continued use of Lumina constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
terms.privacySection7Body: For any questions or concerns about these terms or the privacy policy, please contact the developer.

reauth.title: Re-synchronization required
reauth.desc1: Your Discord connection needs to be updated to include new permissions.
reauth.desc2: We detected that your Discord account was connected before a system update. To ensure all features work correctly, you need to re-authorize.
reauth.desc1Additional: permissions. This allows Lumina to access information about your servers without needing the bot token.
reauth.desc2Additional: of the system. To ensure all features work correctly (including viewing servers and configurations), you need to re-authorize access.
reauth.permissionEmail: Permission to read your email and avatar
reauth.desc1Full: Your Discord connection needs to be updated to include new permissions. This allows Lumina to access information about your servers.
reauth.desc2Full: We detected that your Discord account was connected before a system update. To ensure all features work correctly (including viewing servers and configurations), you need to re-authorize access.
reauth.scopeMembers: Permission to read your member profile (guilds.members.read)
reauth.scopeEmail: Permission to read your email and avatar (identify email)

onboarding.title: Welcome to Lumina!
onboarding.subtitle: Now you can have a unique username to share your public profile.
onboarding.desc: We are introducing **usernames**! Choose a unique handle so other people can find and mention you. Your profile will be accessible at /u/your_username.

onboarding.descFull: We are introducing **usernames**! Choose a unique handle so other people can find and mention you. Your profile will be accessible at /u/your_username. You can change it every 30 days.
